card.name: RG07 Tesselate
card.text: Choose two creatures you control. If their total power is equal to their total toughness, discover creature X twice, where X is their total power, then sacrifice the chosen creatures. (To discover creature X, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland creature card with mana value X or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: CC01 Minimorphosize
card.text: Morphosize. (Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: CW01 Loyal Companion
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: UW01 Fountain Familiar
card.text: Whenever you gain life, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield phased out.

card.name: RA01 Storage Bauble
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from your graveyard. {T}: Put a card exiled with this artifact into your graveyard. If you did, surveil 1. {1}: Untap this artifact.

card.name: CL12 Morphing Pool
card.text: {T}: Morphosize. (Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: CU01 Unhinged Assistant
card.text: {T}, Mill a card: Add {U}. {1}{U}: Mill a card.

card.name: CG01 Floral Recultivator
card.text: {T}: Return target land card from your graveyard to your hand. Add {G}.

card.name: CR01 Manaforce Fireweaver
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, add one mana of any color. {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: CL01 Pillar of Loyalty
card.text: This land enters phased out. When it does, add {W}. Lands you control are Plains in addition to their other types.

card.name: CL02 Pillar of Knowledge
card.text: This land enters phased out. When it does, add {U}. Lands you control are Islands in addition to their other types.

card.name: CL03 Pillar of Knowledge
card.text: This land enters phased out. When it does, add {B}. Lands you control are Swamps in addition to their other types.

card.name: CL04 Pillar of Knowledge
card.text: This land enters phased out. When it does, add {R}. Lands you control are Mountains in addition to their other types.

card.name: CL05 Pillar of Strength
card.text: This land enters phased out. When it does, add {G}. Lands you control are Forests in addition to their other types.

card.name: CL06 Investigator's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create a Clue token. {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: CL07 Archaeologist's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create two Bone tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill a card.") {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: CL08 Genetecist's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: CL09 Shareholder's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create a tapped Treasure token. {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: CL10 Manager's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create two Food tokens. {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: UW09 Mirrorshine Master
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, create a token that's a copy of target token. Evoke {W} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Clue Token RRA
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Bone Token RRA
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Mill a card.

card.name: Treasure Token RRA
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Blood Token RRA
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Food Token RRA
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: CW08 Market Caller
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token, a Clue token, and a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. Evoke {1}{W} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: CW02 Relicpurge Martyr
card.text: Flash When this creature dies, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: CW03 Annoying Lawyer
card.text: Flash Vigilance When this creature enters, target spell phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: CW04 Taxation Specialist
card.text: This creature enters with a taxation counter. Whenever a player casts a spell, if this creature has a taxation counter on it, counter that spell unless that player pays {1}. Remove a taxation counter from this creature.

card.name: CW06 Shine-Blight Shaman
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Exile target creature card from a graveyard. Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. • Exile target artifact or enchantment card from a graveyard. Create a Food token.

card.name: CW07 Abiding Face
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target creature with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: CW05 Shine-Blight Inquisitor
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. When this creature dies, create a Clue token.

card.name: CL13 Laboratory of Insanity
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}. If you would draw a card from an empty library, put a card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library instead.

card.name: CW09 The Eternity-Bartered Cow
card.text: Lifelink Discard this card: You gain 1 life. When this creature dies and when you discard this card, create a Food token.

card.name: CW10 Manyfold Glutton
card.text: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of Foods. Each Food sacrificed this way pays for {W} (or {1}). Flying

prop.type: Creature — Bird Cat Dog Cow Horror

card.name: CW12 Potent Reprisal
card.text: You may discard a white card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. {T}: You gain 3 life.

card.name: CC02 Microtwiddle
card.text: Choose one — • Discover 0 at the beginning of the next end step. (To discover 0, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 0 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) • Target spell phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: CW13 Banishing Glitchcraft
card.text: When you cast this spell, exile target creature until this spell leaves the stack. Create a Food token. Then, this spell phases out until you control no foods. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until then.)

card.name: UW02 Influential Mentor
card.text: Protection from tapped (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything tapped.) Whenever another creature you control attacks alone, it gets +3/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CW14 Flow of Unity
card.text: You may return a Plains you control to its owner's hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: CW15 Paperwork Boomerang
card.text: Each player draws a card. Tap two untapped instant or sorcery spells you control: Create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. Counter another untapped instant or sorcery spell you control: This spell gains rebound. (If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: CL11 Politician's Office
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: CL15 Redacted Basement
card.text: Indestructible {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: CL14 Spire of Renewability
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Untap target instant or sorcery spell.

card.name: CU04 Eater of Detectives
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or dies, create a Clue token. Madness {U} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: UU02 Hunted Practitioner
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Untap target instant or sorcery spell. When this creature dies, target nonland card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: CU03 Taxation Philosopher
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, put a taxation counter on it. Remove a taxation counter from this creature: Untap target permanent or spell. When you do, if you controlled that spell, you may counter it.

card.name: RR07 Ancient Ambush
card.text: Target permanent card in your graveyard gains unearth {0} until end of turn. ({0}: Return that card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: CU02 Tempestborn Drake
card.text: Flying Tap an untapped instant or sorcery spell you control: Add {U}. {U}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CU05 Wizardblood Licker
card.text: Amnesia—Discard a blue card. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its amnesia cost if it was put there from your library this turn. Timing rules still apply.) Whenever you sacrifice a Blood, you may put this creature on the bottom of its owner's library. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: CU08 Calculating Cadaver
card.text: When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand. Create a Blood token and a Clue token. (A Blood token is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: CB03 Specter of Ninjacraft
card.text: Ninjutsu {0} ({0}, Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card.

card.name: CU06 The Narcotoad
card.text: Flying Amnesia—Exile two blue cards from your graveyard, sacrifice two tokens. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its amnesia cost if it was put there from your library this turn. Timing rules still apply.) Cycling—Exile three cards from your graveyard.

card.name: RB08 Lifeblood Pinnacle
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") If you would pay life while you control at least that many tokens, sacrifice that many tokens instead. You may pay 1 life rather than pay for each generic mana in the costs of activated abilities of artifact tokens you control.

card.name: RC01 Strained Evolver
card.text: Level up {1} ({1}: Put a level counter on this. Level up only as a sorcery.) Strained Evolver gets +2/+2 for each level counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice Strained Evolver unless you pay {X}, where X is the number of level counters on Strained Evolver.

card.name: UR01 Aggressive Populace
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. It gains haste until end of turn. Flashback—Discard a red card Discard a card: Put this card from exile into its owner's graveyard. This card's owner may activate this ability.

card.name: RB07 Fact and Fiction
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put any number of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. You lose life equal to twice the number of cards put into your hand this way.

card.name: UM02 Psychic Toad
card.text: Amnesia—Discard a blue card and a black card. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its amnesia cost if it was put there from your library this turn. Timing rules still apply.) Discard a card: Mill a card. Exile four cards from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: CU07 Glitching Fleshbeast
card.text: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of Clues. Each Clue sacrificed this way pays for {U} (or {1}). Ward {1}

card.name: UM01 Taxation Riddler
card.text: Flying Whenever a spell or ability you control counters a spell or ability you control, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: CU10 Butcher's Negation
card.text: Cleave {U}{U} (You may cast this spell for its cleave cost. If you do, remove the words in square brackets.) Counter target spell[[b] you control[/b]].

card.name: CU09 Potent Retreat
card.text: You may discard a blue card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. {T}: Surveil 2.

card.name: CU13 Flow of Logic
card.text: You may return an Island you control to its owner's hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: CU11 Civic Pressure
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1} or exiles four cards from their graveyard.

card.name: CU12 Glitched Out
card.text: Enchant nonland permanent Enchanted permanent is a 1/1 blue Reflection creature with no abilities. (It loses all other colors and types.)

card.name: CU14 Swift Analysis
card.text: Draw two cards. {T}: Surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: CU15 Peruse Trinkets
card.text: Create a Clue token, a Blood token, and a Bone token. (A Blood token an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card." A Bone token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill a card.")

card.name: RB01 Machina, Fingers of Cruelty
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if this creature has no counters on it, put your choice of a haste, deathtouch, menace, +1/+1, or shield counter on this creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) At the beginning of your end step, you may remove a counter from this creature. If you do, create a Treasure token.

card.name: RU01 Ocula, Lenses of Logic
card.text: {T}: Create a Clue token.

card.name: CB02 Prized Vessel
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from outside your hand, return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. When this creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB01 Mana Broker
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, you may pay up to 3 life. Add that much mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: UR10 Exponential Inferno
card.text: Add 2^X {R}. (2⁰ = 1, {2}¹ = 2, {2}² = 4, {2}³ = 8, {2}⁴ = 16, {2}⁵ = 32, and so on.) Exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn.

card.name: UU09 Election Fraud
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library face down and look at those cards, then an opponent chooses one of those cards. Then reveal a card not chosen this way. Then your opponent chooses one of the cards not revealed this way. Put each of the exiled cards except the second card they chose this way into your hand.

card.name: RW01 Lingua, Tastes of Unity
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped or untapped, create a Food token.

card.name: RG01 Capita, Commands of Might
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you control an odd number of tokens, create a token that's a copy of a token you control.

card.name: RR01 Kardia, Beats of Passion
card.text: {T}, Exile a card from your hand: Put target face up card you own in exile into your hand.

card.name: CB05 Delicacy Devourer
card.text: You may sacrifice a two creatures and/or tokens rather than pay this spell's mana cost. When this creature enters, if you paid mana to cast it, create a Food token. Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: UM03 Taxbreaker Emissary
card.text: When this creature enters, add three mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: UM08 Dumpster Devourer
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice a token: You gain 3 life. Pay 6 life: Put this card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: UM04 Terrain Sculptor
card.text: Tap an untapped instant or sorcery spell you control, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: UM05 Gluttonous Socialite
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks or dies, create a Food token.

card.name: UM06 Chef Ascendant
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. Sacrifice a Food: Morphosize. (Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: UM21 Gluttonous Glitchcraft
card.text: {T}: Create a Food token. Draw a card. You lose 2 life. Whenever you gain life, this spell phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: UM07 Archaic Levitator-Mage
card.text: Flying Tap two untapped instant and/or sorcery spells you control: Draw a card.

card.name: RR06 Twiddling Tamperer
card.text: Creatures you control have "Whenever an instant or sorcery spell you control becomes tapped, you may copy it. Do this only once each turn."

card.name: UM09 Trinket Burner
card.text: Haste Sacrifice a token: This creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UM10 Mana-Rich Taxpayer
card.text: {T}: Add {G}{U}. {G}{U}: Put a taxation counter on this creature. Activate only once each turn. Remove a taxation counter from this creature: Untap this creature.

card.name: UM11 Taxation Census
card.text: Counter target spell you control. You gain 1 life and draw a card. Proliferate. For each taxation counter put on a permanent you control by this proliferate action, you gain 1 life and draw a card. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: UM12 Illusory Insight
card.text: {T}: Draw two cards. You lose 1 life. Mill a card. {U}{B}: This spell phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: UM13 Horrific Killings
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.) Each player sacrifices a creature. Draw a card for each creature sacrificed this way. You lose 1 life.

card.name: CB15 Societal Suffering
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.) You gain 1 life and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: UM14 Ruinous Reclamation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land. Untap all lands you control.

card.name: UM15 Gleeful Gluttony
card.text: Destroy target artifact. If it was a Food you controlled, create four 1/1 colorless Citizen creature tokens.

card.name: UM16 Ascend into Taste
card.text: Morphosize. Create a Food token. (Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.)

card.name: UM17 Artistic Patronage
card.text: Untap all spells you control. Draw a card.

card.name: UM18 Feed on Rot
card.text: Each opponent loses X life, where is the amount of life you've gained this turn plus the number of Foods you control.

card.name: UM19 Shopping Rush
card.text: Create a Clue token, a Treasure token, a Blood token, and a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: UM20 Real Estate Purchase
card.text: Kicker {X} (You may pay an additional {X} as you cast this spell.) Draw a card. You may play an additional land this turn. If this spell was kicked, put X +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

card.name: CB04 Toad Pactbearer
card.text: Amnesia—Discard a black card. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its amnesia cost if it was put there from your library this turn. Timing rules still apply.) When this creature enters, draw a card. You lose 1 life.

card.name: CB06 City Vulture
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, draw two cards and create a Food token and a Bone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill a card.")

card.name: CB07 The Alley Wraith
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, create a Bone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill a card.") Cycling {BP} ({BP}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CB08 Remains of Terror
card.text: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of Bones. Each Bone sacrificed this way pays for {B} (or {1}). Menace

card.name: CB10 Potent Ruin
card.text: You may discard a black card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Destroy target creature with total power and toughness 5 or less. {T}: You gain 1 life and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: CB11 Grasp of Death
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create a Bone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Mill a card.")

card.name: CB12 Union Massacre
card.text: Destroy target creature. Up to two target creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: CB13 Flow of Cruelty
card.text: You may return a Swamp you control to its owner's hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Target opponent reveals their hand. You may choose a creature card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: CB14 Must Keep Living
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a shield counter on it." (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: CR04 Painter of Flesh
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, create a Blood token and a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: CC03 Redacted Etching
card.text: Add one mana of any color. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: CR03 Real Estate Rager // Scare a Deal
card.text:
This creature enters prepared. When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. Put a land counter on that token. (It's a land in addition to its other types.)
---
Add {R}.

card.name: UU06 Modernmind Master
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, return up to one target permanent you control to its owner's hand. Evoke {U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: CW11 Outlands Ostrich
card.text: First strike When this creature deals combat damage to a player, discover 4. Any creatures cast this way enter tapped and attacking. (To discover 4, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 4 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: CB09 Glitch Lich
card.text: When this creature enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield phased out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: CR02 Raging Crowd
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.)

card.name: CR05 Tempestborn Goblin
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Tap two untapped instant and/or sorcery spells you control: Discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: CR06 Tectonics Druid
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, if you've sacrificed a land this turn, search your library for two land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CR07 The Phoenix Rider
card.text: Flying Transmute—Discard a card at random. (Discard a card at random, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.) Discard a red card: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: CR08 Hemoguzzler
card.text: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of Bloods. Each Blood sacrificed this way pays for {R} (or {1}). Haste

card.name: CR09 Raging Oculus
card.text: When this creature enters, create three Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Sacrifice a Blood: Choose one. Activate only as a a sorcery — • This creature deals 1 damage to any target. • Destroy target artifact with mana value 2 or less. • Destroy target token.

card.name: CR10 Potent Pyre
card.text: You may discard a red card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. This spell deals 2 damage to any target. {T}: Discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: RU02 Insightful Glitchcraft
card.text: Draw a card. {T}: Another target tapped instant or sorcery spell gains this card's abilities.

card.name: RW02 Harmonious Glitchcraft
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token. {T}: Another target tapped instant or sorcery spell gains this card's abilities.

card.name: RB02 Sinister Glitchcraft
card.text: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 2 life. {T}: Another target tapped instant or sorcery spell gains this card's abilities.

card.name: RR02 Covetous Glitchcraft
card.text: Create a tapped Treasure token. {T}: Another target tapped instant or sorcery spell gains this card's abilities.

card.name: RG02 Colossal Glitchcraft
card.text: A creature you control with the lowest toughness among creatures you control gets +4/+4 until end of turn. {T}: Another target tapped instant or sorcery spell gains this card's abilities.

card.name: CR11 Stabber's Stains
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to target creature. Create two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: CR12 Great City Fire
card.text: This spell deals 5 damage to target creature. Destroy up to two target tokens.

card.name: CR13 Shatter the Display
card.text: Destroy target artifact. If a permanent you controlled was destroyed this way, draw a card. If a token was destroyed this way, draw a card.

card.name: CR14 Flow of Passion
card.text: You may return a Mountain you control to its owner's hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Mill two cards. You may play one of them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: CR15 Irresponsible Harvesting
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice a land (You may sacrifice a land in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, it gains trample and first strike.

card.name: UR03 Glitched Laser Cannon
card.text: Defender {T}: This creature deals 2 damage to each opponent. Whenever a tapped spell you control resolves, untap this creature.

card.name: UB07 Morphblight Master
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, morphosize. This creature can't be sacrificed for that morphosize action. (Look at the top five cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice a creature to put a creature card with mana value X or less from among those cards onto the battlefield, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.) Evoke {B} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: UR07 Manaforce Master
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, add one mana of any color. Evoke {R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: UG08 Manaforce Master
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature enters or attacks, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Evoke {G} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: CG02 Sage of Broken Earth
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice a land (You may sacrifice a land in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter and a trample counter if it was kicked. {G}, Remove a counter from this creature: Search your library for a land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CG03 Naturalist Popularizer
card.text: {T}: Add {G}{G}.

card.name: CG04 Fast Food Glutton
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, create a Food token. Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice a Food or Citizen. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature.

card.name: CG05 Arachnophobic Glitchbeast
card.text: Vigilance, reach, deathtouch Tap an untapped instant or sorcery spell you control: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CG06 Gluttonous Gardener
card.text: When this creature dies, create two Food tokens. Sacrifice three Foods: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Cycling {GP}{GP} ({GP}{GP}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CG07 The Grave Troll
card.text: Trample Reinforce 1—{GP} ({GP}, Discard this card: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.) Dredge 4 (If you would draw a card, you may mill four cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: CG08 Rampaging Killer
card.text: As you cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of Citizens. Each Citizen sacrificed this way pays for {G} (or {1}). Vigilance

card.name: CG09 Extremely Slow Glitchbeast
card.text: Last strike (This creature deals combat damage after creatures without last strike.) Sacrifice a Citizen, Food, or land: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CG10 Outlands Dreadmaw
card.text: Trample {G}, Discard this card, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: CG11 Potent Protest
card.text: You may discard a green card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. {T}: Create a 1/1 colorless Citizen creature token.

card.name: CG12 Chomp
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. Create a Food token.

card.name: CG13 Flow of Might
card.text: You may return a Forest you control to its owner's hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: CG14 Recultivating Rumble
card.text: Mill four cards. Return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CG15 Split Growth
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. {T}: Target creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn.
